$comment: AI-mode model catalog for the RTX 5090 / Ryzen 9 9950X3D / 64GB DDR5 build. Maps the user's use-case menu to concrete models. Text + vision LLMs run in LM Studio (lms get / lms load, OpenAI-compatible server on port 8080); image-generation models run in ComfyUI (separate, port 8188 — LM Studio cannot serve diffusion models). Every repo/quant/size here is web-verified (2026-06). Future hardware tiers (see docs/website-configurator-design.md) would scale this catalog by VRAM.

server.note: LM Studio's OpenAI-compatible server; --port 8080 so the existing thin clients (distro-ai-ask/overlay/nautilus) work unchanged.

qwen2.5-coder-32b.name: Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct
qwen2.5-coder-32b.note: Best coding/CAD model; fits fully in 32GB VRAM. Q6_K (26.9GB) also fits if you want higher quality.

deepseek-coder-v2-16b.name: DeepSeek-Coder-V2-Lite-Instruct (16B MoE)
deepseek-coder-v2-16b.note: 16B-total MoE (~2.4B active) — fast. If output is garbage on an old LM Studio build, disable flash attention.

llama3.3-70b.name: Llama-3.3-70B-Instruct
llama3.3-70b.note: Q4_K_M is 42.5GB — EXCEEDS 32GB VRAM, so partial CPU offload (--gpu 0.8) to the 64GB DDR5. Realistic ~6-12 tok/s (the optimistic 15-20 needs a smaller quant).

qwen2.5-14b.name: Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct
qwen2.5-14b.note: Balanced day-to-day; fits fully with huge context headroom.

dolphin-llama3-8b.name: Dolphin 2.9 Llama-3 8B (uncensored)
dolphin-llama3-8b.note: Uncensored; ChatML template. Maps the Ollama 'dolphin-llama3:8b' tag.

dolphin-mixtral-8x7b.name: Dolphin 2.7 Mixtral 8x7B (uncensored MoE)
dolphin-mixtral-8x7b.note: Right at the edge of 32GB VRAM — keep context modest or it spills to RAM. ChatML.

qwen2.5-vl-32b.name: Qwen2.5-VL-32B-Instruct (vision)
qwen2.5-vl-32b.note: Vision WORKS in LM Studio (libmtmd). REQUIRES its mmproj-model-f16.gguf (1.38GB) in the same folder — lms get pulls it. Needs a current LM Studio CUDA runtime.

qwen2.5-vl-7b.name: Qwen2.5-VL-7B-Instruct (vision)
qwen2.5-vl-7b.note: SUBSTITUTE for the requested llama3.2-vision:11b, which does NOT work in LM Studio — llama.cpp never implemented its 'mllama' architecture (loads fail with 'unknown model architecture: mllama'). Qwen2.5-VL-7B is the closest fully-supported lighter vision model.

flux1-dev.name: FLUX.1-dev
flux1-dev.note: Best image gen. GATED on HF (accept license + token). Runs in ComfyUI, NOT LM Studio. Default install uses the no-token FLUX.1-schnell instead unless you provide HF_TOKEN.

sdxl.name: Stable Diffusion XL base 1.0
sdxl.note: Fast image gen, no token. Runs in ComfyUI.
